summary: Round 3 remains correct and complete on the diff-scoped evidence. The token scan enumerates each secx:property predicate independently across whitespace and comments, rejects unsupported non-secx object forms loudly, and avoids matching commented-out or IRI-internal text. The regression tests exercise the prior silent-skip case and the principal false-positive cases, while the ownership map and its test consistently declare both cross-crate compile-time reads. No correctness, soundness, test-validity, or security issue is present. The targeted Rust test could not be executed in this environment because cargo is unavailable; this does not reveal a defect in the submitted change.
